assessment_objectives.objective: embedded technology controls are implemented to protect the confidentiality of Operational Technology (OT) and/or Internet of Things (IoT) technologies.
embedded technology controls are implemented to protect the integrity of Operational Technology (OT) and/or Internet of Things (IoT) technologies.
embedded technology controls are implemented to protect the availability of Operational Technology (OT) and/or Internet of Things (IoT) technologies.
embedded technology controls are implemented to protect the safety of Operational Technology (OT) and/or Internet of Things (IoT) technologies.
embedded technology management operations are conducted according to documented policies, standards, procedures and/or other organizational directives.
adequate resources (e.g., people, processes, technologies, data and/or facilities) are provided to support embedded technology management operations.
responsibility and authority for the performance of embedded technology management-related activities are assigned to designated personnel.
personnel performing embedded technology management-related activities have the skills and knowledge needed to perform their assigned duties.
